description: Why BUY from Infiniti of Akron?     When you choose this Radiant White/Black Obsidian 2026 INFINITI QX60 AUTOGRAPH with 0 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!     No Accidents!      One Owner!  What this vehicle includes:     Dark Cargo Package ($440 value)Black Rear Bumper FilmCargo BlocksCargo MatMedic KitCargo Net          Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: The 2025 Honda Civic Sport is a remarkable vehicle that combines style, performance, and advanced safety features, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a modern driving experience. The Honda Civic Sport comes equipped with a 2L I-4 gasoline direct injection engine, delivering an impressive 150HP paired with a CVT transmission, ensuring a smooth and efficient ride.One of the standout features of the Civic Sport is its **Smart device mirroring**. This technology allows drivers to seamlessly connect their smartphones to the vehicles infotainment system, enhancing convenience and safety. You can control your device without distractions, keeping your focus on the road ahead.Safety is paramount in the Civic Sport, highlighted by its **Forward collision mitigation** system. This innovative feature actively monitors the road, preparing the vehicle to reduce the severity of potential accidents. Its designed to give you peace of mind during your journeys, making it an essential addition to your driving experience.Another impressive safety technology is **Hands-on steering assist/lane centering**. This system acts as your co-pilot, maintaining a safe distance from surrounding vehicles while also keeping you centered in your lane. With minimal driver input required, it alleviates the stress of long road trips.The **Rear camera** feature further enhances safety by providing a clear view of whats behind you, giving you an extra set of eyes when reversing. Additionally, the **Lane departure prevention** system helps you stay within your lane, ensuring a safer driving experience by taking corrective actions when necessary.For those who frequently encounter traffic, the **Adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go** is a game-changer. This feature automatically adjusts your speed to match the vehicle ahead, even bringing you to a stop when traffic halts, then resuming as traffic moves again making your daily commute much easier.With **Brake assist**, the Civic Sport is equipped to respond to emergency situations effectively, applying maximum braking power when needed. This feature, combined with **Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls**, reduces driver fatigue, allowing for a more relaxed driving experience.Lastly, the **Keyfob vehicle start control** adds an element of convenience, allowing you to start your engine remotely. This is perfect for ensuring your vehicle is comfortable before you even step inside.Overall, the 2025 Honda Civic Sport stands out with its blend of performance, safety, and innovative technology, making it a top choice for drivers who value both style and substance.Discover unbeatable deals and premium service at *Culver City Honda*, conveniently located near *Los Angeles,* *Santa Monica*, *Marina Del Ray* and *Beverly Hills*. As a Certified vehicle, it is backed by a rigorous factory inspection and includes extended warranty protection, ensuring this performance truck is ready for its next adventure.Built for the dirt, the Tremor comes standard with a specially tuned off-road suspension, all-terrain tires, and a series of heavy-duty skid plates to protect its underside.At Galpin Ford, our commitment to our customers produces one of the most valuable assets  and that's trust! We know you can't buy trust. You have to earn it! People have come to know that they can trust Galpin for the right selection, the right price, the right service and the latest innovations. That's why 92% of our customers are either repeat, reputational or referral. That's the Power of Trust! With over 75 years of automotive excellence we offer a commitment to an open, honest, and fair shopping experience. As an auto group we represent over 12 different brands from Volkswagen, Mazda, Honda, Lotus, Ford, Land Rover, Aston Martin, Lincoln, Polestar and Volvo. We have done a great amount of work to have the perfect selection of Pre-Owned vehicles and have researched hundreds of dealerships within a set radius to ensure we are competitively priced. Come on in today to check out our selection of Pre-Owned vehicles and experience exceptional service you can trust! description: Experience the epitome of luxury and performance in this stunning 2025 BMW 5 Series 530i. With its rear-wheel-drive configuration, this BMW offers a thrilling and responsive driving experience that will leave you eager to take on the open road.  The exterior of this 5 Series is finished in a stunning White, complemented by the premium features that set it apart. Step inside and you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring luxurious Perforated & Quilted Veganza Upholstery, Heated Front Seats, and a host of advanced technology and convenience features.  From the intuitive BMW Curved Display with Head-Up Display to the seamless integration of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, this 5 Series is designed to keep you connected and in control. The Bowers & Wilkins Surround Sound system will immerse you in your favorite music, while the Wireless Device Charging and Personal eSIM 5G capabilities ensure you're always powered up and ready to go.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like the Emergency Communication System, Dual Front Impact and Side Airbags, and an array of advanced driver-assistance technologies to help keep you and your passengers secure.  This 2025 BMW 5 Series 530i is a true testament to the brand's commitment to excellence. With its exceptional performance, cutting-edge technology, and unparalleled luxury, it's the ultimate choice for the discerning driver. Financing for Every Customer

The information provided is a guideline only. Please consult a Key Automotive Sales & Service representative for complete details.
- Financing Terms
- Financing arranged through Key Automotive is subject to credit approval; finance charges may apply.
- The Discounted Price is available only when one of the following applies:
- Cash payment
- Customer-arranged financing or
- Financing arranged by Key Automotive through one of these qualifying lenders: Wells Fargo Home Loan Auto Loan Ally Bank Citadel FCU Lentegrity or OneMain Financial.
- Additional Costs
- Prices exclude tax title tags and documentation fee.
- All vehicles are subject to prior sale.
- Key Automotive Sales & Service and Dealer Car Search assume no responsibility for typographical errors or misprints regarding price equipment mileage or other data. Please verify all information before purchase.
- Savings-Discount Requirements
- To secure the advertised savings the purchaser must also select one or more qualifying products offered by the dealership such as:
- Extended Vehicle Service Contract (Warranty)
- Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP) or
- Other approved ancillary protections.
- Customers who decline these products may still purchase the vehicle at the advertised price plus a dealer destination fee of $895.
Representative Payment Example
Estimated monthly payment is based on the discounted vehicle price a 72-month term 4.95 % APR and a $1000 down payment. Actual terms will vary according to lender approval creditworthiness and the specific vehicle selected.
For full program details or to confirm vehicle availability please contact our sales team at 215-399-7300 or visit us in person. We look forward to earning your business!

Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.  *  Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.=== Safety and Security ===  *  Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.=== Technology and Telematics ===  *  Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  *  Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: Recent Arrival! 2025 Toyota Tundra Limited 4WD 10-Speed Automatic 3.4L V6 4WD, Boulder Artificial Leather.When youre looking for a full-size pickup that blends commanding capability with refined comfort and modern technology, the 2025 Toyota Tundra Limited stands confidently at the top of the list. Designed for drivers who need serious truck performance during the workweek and premium comfort for weekend adventures, the Tundra Limited delivers a well-rounded ownership experience backed by Toyotas legendary reliability and long-term value.This 2025 model represents the continued evolution of Toyotas flagship truckboldly styled, intelligently engineered, and thoughtfully equipped to meet the demands of todays truck buyers. Whether youre towing, hauling, commuting, or traveling with family and friends, the Tundra Limited is built to handle it all with ease and confidence.From the moment you see it, the 2025 Toyota Tundra Limited makes a powerful first impression. Its muscular stance, wide body, and sculpted lines give it an unmistakable road presence that reflects its true capability. Toyota has carefully balanced rugged truck styling with upscale design elements, making the Tundra Limited equally at home on the jobsite or parked in your driveway.The front end features a bold grille design unique to the Limited trim, flanked by sleek headlights that provide excellent visibility while enhancing the trucks modern appearance. Clean body lines and purposeful proportions give the Tundra a confident look that doesnt rely on excessit simply looks strong because it is strong.Chrome-accented exterior details add a touch of sophistication, while durable wheels and all-season tires ensure confident traction across a variety of road and weather conditions. Practical features such as a durable bed, integrated tie-down points, and easy-access tailgate functionality make the Tundra as useful as it is stylish.At its core, the 2025 Toyota Tundra Limited is a truck designed to work. Whether youre hauling equipment, towing a trailer, or loading up for a weekend getaway, the Tundra delivers dependable strength and performance you can trust.Toyota engineered the Tundra with a robust frame and advanced powertrain options designed to provide impressive torque, confident acceleration, and strong towing capability. The result is a truck that feels powerful yet composed, even under heavy loads. Smooth power delivery and responsive handling help make everyday driving comfortable, while the trucks inherent strength is always ready when you need it.Advanced suspension tuning helps balance ride comfort with capability, ensuring the Tundra Limited remains stable and controlled whether youre cruising down the highway or navigating rougher terrain. For drivers who want a truck that can confidently handle real-world demands without sacrificing refinement, the Tundra Limited hits the mark.Modern drivers expect modern technology, and the 2025 Toyota Tundra Limited delivers in a big way. The infotainment system is designed to keep you connected, informed, and entertained wherever the road takes you.A large, easy-to-read touchscreen serves as the central hub for navigation, media, and vehicle information. Smartphone integration allows you to seamlessly connect your compatible device, giving you access to your favorite apps, music, contacts, and messaging features without distraction.Voice command functionality and steering wheel-mounted controls help keep your focus on the road while still giving you control over key features. Bluetooth connectivity makes hands-free calling and audio streaming simple and convenient, while available navigation features help ensure you always know the best route to your destination.Multiple USB ports and power outlets provide charging options for passengers, making the Tundra Limited an excellent choice for families, road trips, and long workdays.Elgin[!@@Additional Info@@!]Turbocharged,Four Wheel Drive,Tow Hitch,Power Steering,ABS,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,Brake Assist,Brake Actuated Limited Slip Differential,Aluminum Wheels,Tires - You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.  *  Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.  *  Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: indiGO Auto Group is delighted to showcase, this 2025 Ford F-150 Raptor R 4X4 SuperCrew. Dressed in a commanding Space White Metallic exterior and equipped with the highly sought-after RECARO® Black Leather Seats, this truck blends aggressive design with off-road dominance and luxury refinement. The F-150 Raptor R elevates the already legendary Raptor series, boasting bold styling cues such as 17 Forged Aluminum Beadlock Capable Wheels, a Dual Exhaust System with Dual Tailpipes, and signature Rigid® LED Fog Lamps. It also features the impressive Twin Panel Moonroof and Toughbed Spray-in Bedliner, enhancing both functionality and style. With its extended 145 wheelbase, this truck delivers superior cabin space and stability.  Key Features:   Equipment Group 803A - Raptor Series:  Featuring exclusive performance hardware and styling enhancements tailored for the ultimate off-road experience.  FOX® Dual Live Valve Shocks:  Offer unmatched adaptability and control on rugged terrains.  Mobile Office Package:  A tech-savvy setup for those who need productivity on the go.  Twin Panel Moonroof:  Expands your view and lets the outdoors in with the touch of a button.  Pro Trailer Backup & Hitch Assist:  Revolutionize trailer handling with intuitive guidance systems.  360-Degree Camera & Head-Up Display:  Offers ultimate situational awareness and driving information right in your line of sight.  Engine and Performance: Under the hood lies a brutal 5.2L Supercharged V8 engine that roars to life with an astounding 700 horsepower and 640 lb-ft of torque. This beast is paired with an electronic 10-speed automatic transmission and fortified by FOX® Dual Live Valve Shocks, a 5-Link Rear Suspension, and 4.10 Electronic Locking Rear Axle. Whether carving through trails or dominating the pavement, the Raptor R is engineered to perform with relentless confidence.    Step inside and you're welcomed by a tech-forward, ruggedly refined interior featuring RECARO® Black Leather Seats, a 12 Productivity Screen, Heated and Ventilated Front Seats, Heated 2nd Row Seats, and a premium B&O® Unleashed 14-Speaker Sound System. Enjoy next-level convenience with the Mobile Office Package, Head-Up Display, Adaptive Cruise Control, and SYNC® 4 with 12 Touchscreen and Enhanced Voice Recognition. Designed for serious off-roaders and tech enthusiasts alike, the interior layout is both intuitive and bold, echoing the Raptor's powerful spirit.  This 2025 Ford F-150 Raptor R is far more than a truck; it's a statement of dominance, capability, and luxury. With its state-of-the-art tech and brute force under the hood, it offers an experience unlike any other in its class. Volkswagen Marin is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful VW Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and Volkswagen accessories boutique. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance.
